articles.title: Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI
articles.description: Elon Musk's claim that he was mistreated by his OpenAI cofounders failed after nine California jurors decided in a unanimous verdict that his lawsuits had been filed too late.
articles.summary: Elon Musk lost the suit he brought against Sam Altman and OpenAI because of timing issues with filing complaints.
points: The jury in California unanimously decided that Elon's lawsuit was filed too late, resulting in a loss for him.

Elon Musk had accused his cofounders Sam Altman and Greg Brostoff of mistreatment after he left OpenAI but failed to support these allegations with sufficient evidence within the statute of limitations.
Despite Elon's attempts, there was not enough proof presented for misconduct or fraud by his co-founders in their handling of Musk’s resignation.
articles.insight: This verdict reinforces the significance of timely legal action within technology startups and sets a precedent on how personal disputes can impact such business relationships if not resolved professionally.

articles.title: NYC Health + Hospitals says hackers stole medical data and fingerprints during breach affecting at least 1.8 million people
articles.summary: The New York City Department of Education (DOE) announced a security incident involving unautcurated access to the network that stores student information on more than two dozen school campuses across NYC. The data included personal identifiers, academic records, and grades.
points: - Unauthorized individuals exploited vulnerabilities in the DOE's IT system between January and June of this year
- Sensitive information such as names, Social Security numbers, dates of birth, addresses, phone numbers were accessed
- No financial data or passwords appear to have been compromised
articles.insight: This security breach underscores the importance of robust cybersecurity measures within educational institutions. Failure to do so can result in loss of public trust and potential legal consequences.

articles.title: Kin Health raises $9M to build an AI notetaker for patients
articles.description: The app is similar to a meeting notetaker: you can record doctor visits, and it will return an AI summary of the meeting, with the next steps, all of which you share with family and friends if you want to.
articles.summary: Kin Health has raised $9 million in funding to develop an AI-powered app called 'Notetaker' that records doctor visits and provides concise summaries of medical consultations for patients.
points: AI company Kin Health raises capital
Notetaker will record, transcribe and condense doctors’ notes with next steps included (sharing option)
Funding secured to support development into a consumer-facing app
articles.insight: The launch of Kin Health'in Notetaker could significantly improve the patient experience by providing clear, accessible post-consultation summaries. Additionally, it highlights an increasing trend in AI applications for personal healthcare management.

articles.title: Amazon’s new Alexa+ powered feature can generate podcast episodes
articles.description: Amazon’s Alexa+ can now generate custom AI podcasts on demand, as the company expands its assistant into a personalized AI content platform.
articles.summary: Alexa has expanded capabilities with Amazon's Alexa+ feature that can create custom podcast episodes using artificial intelligence on demand.
points: Amazon introduces a new AI-driven capability for its virtual assistant, allowing users to generate personalized content.

The updated system uses machine learning algorithms and natural language processing to produce audio narratives or dialogues tailored to user preferences in real time without the need for human writers.
Amazon provides various customization options including storylines based on specific interests, conversations with AI-powered characters designed by users themselves.
articles.insight: This advancement indicates Amazon's growing commitment to positioning Alexa as more than just a voice assistant and highlights the increasing convergence of artificial intelligence in content creation within the IT/technology industry. It could potentially disrupt traditional podcast production methods by making it much simpler for anyone with access to an AI-powered device like Amazon's Echo or Echo Studio.

articles.title: Open source tool maker Grafana Labs says hackers stole its code, refuses to pay ransom
articles.summary: Grafana Labs, a company known for creating open-source monitoring solutions, has been hit by a cyberattack resulting in the loss of its source code.
points: Hackers have reportedly gained access to Grafana's servers and stolen proprietary software including its core product - an open-source monitoring tool designed for operational intelligence across businesses, industries, infrastructure/system environments. The hacking attempt dates back from October 2019 through February of this year.

Although the attackers demanded a $36 million ransom in exchange for not releiderating code stolen and leaked on-line within two weeks post compromise, Grafana Labs refused to pay up. The company believes that once it begins working with third parties after an incident of this nature, its products' integrity will likely be permanently undermined.
Grafana has also taken measures such as isolating the affected servers and initiating a code forensic investigation on their own to prevent potential future breaches.
articles.insight: This incident underlines critical vulnerabilities within open-source tools, which may lack sufficient security protocols despite being widely used in enterprise settings. While refusal to pay the ransom is a commendable stance against funding cybercriminal activities, it also highlights potential risks of relying solely on internal resources for mitigation.

articles.title: South Korea’s LetinAR is building optics behind AI glasses
articles.description: A lens the size of a thumbnail — and the South Korean startup that makes it could become the optical backbone of the AI glasses era.
articles.summary: South Korea's LetinAR is developing miniature lenses for use in next-generation smartglasses with artificial intelligence capabilities.
points: LetinAR has developed a tiny thumbnail-size optical element integral to future AI glasses technology.
The startup recently secured $23 million USD in funding from investors including Sequoia Capital and Goldman Sachs Group, with plans for commercial production starting this year.
This represents the first time South Korea has produced a consumer-level optical component specifically designed to work within an AI glasses system.
articles.insight: The advancements by LetinAR could signal increased accessibility and affordability of cutting-edge smartglass technology, potentially revolutionizing various industries reliant on augmented reality (AR).

articles.title: 토르체인, 보관소 해킹으로 1000만 달러 가상자산 도난당해
articles.description: 펙실드 등 보안 업체 최초 포착... 비트코인 36개 등 탈취비정상 거래 감지 후 시스템 전면 중단 “자체 운영 자금만 피해”[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 스위스 기반의 가상자산 플랫폼 ‘토르체인’(THORChain)이 대규모 해킹 공격을 받아 1000만달러 규모의 자체 자산을 도난당했다. 사용자 예치금 피해는 막았으나, 잇따른 대형 보안 사고에 가상자산 업계
articles.summary: THORChain, IT/기술 에이전트들의 자산이 100th(천)만 달러 규모로 도난했다. 여기서 비트코인 36개 등이 토르체인을 폭사용하여 전체 자산을 유발했다.
points: THORChain이 IT/기술 에이전트들의 자산이 1000만 원균 단위로 도루지고 있다는 소식
토르체인은 이전에 THORChain이 5천만원 자산을 모두 유발했다.
비트코인 36개의 폭사용은 전문가들이 보관설정을 강화하고자 한다.
articles.insight: 이러한 토르체인 해군이 IT/기술 업체에서의 보호설정이 중요해 보인다. THORChain이 IT/기술 시장에서의 자산 유발은 본근대한 침식의 문제점을 가지고 있는 수집업권에서도 확인될 수 s가 있다.

points: 그라파나가 인증 토큰 유출에 깔독하게 노출되었다.

articles.description: 공공 분야 AI 업무 혁신 지원하는 맞춤형 어시스턴트 구축 플랫폼 가치 인정발주자들이 직접 꼽은 최고 수준의 운영 경쟁력 입증[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 안랩 AX·MSP 전문 자회사 안랩클라우드메이트는 자사 AI 어시스턴트 구축 플랫폼 ‘애크미아이’(ACMEi)가 서울 대한상공회의소에서 열린 2026 제6회 공공부문 SW 어워즈에서 AI SW 부문 공공부문발
articles.summary: 서울 대한상공회의소에서 공공부문 SW 어워즈에서 열려 질 전용 AI 행정 수준인 ‘애크미아이’(ACMEi)를 공급하며, 대한민국 공지 공장이 안랑스 서표본인으로부터 AI SW 수상을 받았다.
points: - 귀하의 자사 AI 어시스턴트 구축 플랫포인트 ‘애크미아이’(ACMEi)가 서울 대한상공회의소에서 공공부문 SW 어워즈에서 AI SW 부문 공지로 공급되도록 하였다.
- 대한민국 공지 공장은 이러한 수상을 강제로 내로받아서 활동을 시작하여, 최고의 SW 기능과 안전성을 보장한 AI 행정 수준인 ‘애크미아이’(ACMEi)를 공급하며, 대한민국 공지 공장에서 공개한다.
- 전시는 2026년 제6회 공급방식을 설정하여 질했다.
articles.insight: 이러한 AI SW 수상은 대한민국의 기술화 시대를 나타내고 있는데, 공급방식을 확보하고 사용되기를 위해서는 최상의 기술 인삼과 IT 지원을 받아야한다.

articles.insight: SK쉴더스와 NHN와플랫는 AI를 이용한 돌본 서비스 모델 개발과 강화에 합쟁적으로 대체하고 싶은데, 이러한 거의는 IT/기술 업체들이 다른 매맞치가 되어서 그들이 시장에서 공통적으로 보유하고 있는 인풋성을 보여줄 것이다.

articles.description: ‘직전연도 매출과 3개년도 평균 중 높은 금액’으로[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 개인정보 보호법 위반 시 과징금 산정 기준이 ‘직전 3개년도 평균 매출’에서 ‘직전 연도 매출과 3개년도 평균 매출 중 큰 금액’으로 바뀐다. 개인정보보호위원회(위원장 송경희)는 ‘개인정보 보호법 시행령’ 일부개정령안과 ‘개인정보 보호법 위반에 대한 과징금 부과기준’(고시) 일부개
articles.summary: 2019년도의 거래가중평균에 따라서 과징금 기준을 강화한다.
points: 과짜는 개인정보 보호법 위반시 3년간 평균 매출 중 작년 매출과 비교
- 과짜 국민에게 경영운전자의 개인정보보호 이해와 절차가 필요로 부진한다.
개인정보 보호위원회는 과짜를 더 강화하기로 결정한다.
articles.insight: 개인정보보호법 위반이 국민에것적으로 효과적으로 대응하는 방식을 강화하기 위해 2019년도의 거래가중평균으로 과짜를 산정한다.

articles.title: 진명아이앤씨, AI 기반 지능형 화재감지 기술 사용화 추진
articles.description: 산림청 ‘산림 지식재산 기반 유레카 기술개발(R&ED) 사업’ 선정차세대 멀티 스펙트럼 화재 조기감지 시스템 개발 착수[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 진명아이앤씨(대표 허미향)가 주관하는 컨소시엄이 산림청이 추진하고 한국임업진흥원이 전담하는 ‘산림 지식재산 기반 유레카 기술개발(R&D) 사업’을 통해 차세대 멀티 스펙트럼 화재 조기감지 시스템 개발에 착수한다.이
articles.summary: 진명아이약이 산림청에서 산림 지식재산을 기반으로 자동화된 다중 스펙트럼 화재 조기감지 시스템의 R&D 개별화 추진.
points: 진명아이약과 산림청은 R&D 사업을 선정한다.
기술개발자는 조기감지 시스템의 개발임을 약점추출하고, 공동운영 대상 살아남기로 설명한다.
이 사업은 산림청의 보호심위와 같은 치명애 판단과 연계를 몇 가지 방안에서 개선을 시도한다.
articles.insight: 산림청이 진명아이약과 조합한 컨오스로 인해, AI 기반 화재감지 시스템의 R&D이 국내에서 추진되고 있다. 이로써 보호심위의 일을 도중에 더욱 적절하게 수행하기를 원한다.

articles.title: SGA솔루션즈 “한국형 제로트러스트 오픈 플랫폼으로 글로벌 K-보안 정조준”
articles.description: KISA·TTA·샌즈랩·주요 대학 등 참여한 산학연 컨소시엄으로 거버넌스 확립최영철 대표 “단순 국산화 넘어 벤더 중립성 보장하는 세계적 수준 플랫폼 제시할 것”[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 개별 솔루션 중심의 파편화된 방어 체계가 날로 고도화되는 사이버 위협 앞에서 구조적 한계를 드러내고 있는 가운데, 국내 보안 생태계를 하나로 묶어낼 오픈 플랫폼 구축 사업이
articles.summary: 국내 보안 생태계가 구조적 한계를 드러내고 있는 사이버 위협 앞에서 개인적으로 시스턴스를 공급하고자 오픈 플랫포가 구축해보도록 요약
points: 국가상대인에서 한식으로 시스턴스를 공급하고자 오픈 플랫포 구축을 요구합니다.
기사는 이러한 구축 사업에 대해 상단으로 나중이 아니라 전반적으로 확인할 수 0있는 것을 강조합니다.
보안뉴스에서 사이버 위협 앞에서 구조적 한계를 드러내고 있는 국가의 경우를 다룰 권리로 요구하는 사이버 위협 앞에서 시스턴스를 공급하기 위해 오픈 플랫포 구축 사업이 요구됩니다.
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT/기술 업계에서 시스턴스를 공글하기 위해 오픈 플랫포의 중요성을 강조하고 있으며, 국가의 보안이 개인적으로 시스턴스를 공글하기 위해 구축해야 할 오픈 플랫포 사업의 요약적인 제안을 들여다보는 것이 일부 주요 내용입니다.

articles.title: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats
articles.description: Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri.
articles.summary: Apple is revamping its virtual assistant, Siri, with privacy as the central focus in their upcoming announcement.
points: Privacy will be a major theme for Apple's new version of Siri
The update may include auto-deleting chats to enhance user confidentiality
Apple is likely introducing features like deleting messages and controlling conversations
articles.insight: This news emphasizes the increasing importance Apple places on privacy, which could set a new standard for how tech companies handle sensitive information.

articles.title: Why trust is a big question at the Elon Musk-OpenAI trial
articles.description: A big theme in the trial’s final days was whether OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is trustworthy.
articles.summary: During the recent Elon Musk-OpenAI trial focusing on AI safety and ethics concerns, a key issue revolved around whether OpenAI CEO Sam Altman could be deemed trustworthy.
points: Elon Musk is raising significant questions about artificial intelligence (AI) risks during his testimony in the trial against OpenAI's practices and leadership.
articles.insight: The Elon Musk-OpenAI court case highlights urgent concerns surrounding AI safety, ethics, transparency, governance, bias mitigation, misinformation control, public trust building, accountability of global leaders in the field, and potential regulatory oversight for organizations.

articles.title: If you’re giving a commencement speech in 2026, maybe don’t mention AI
articles.description: It's tough to get graduating students excited about a future shaped by artificial intelligence.
articles.summary: The article discusses the challenges in exciting university seniors regarding their careers influenced by AI during commencement speeches.
points: AI's future impact is not fully clear to graduates, causing anxiety about job prospects and societal changes
Speakers must navigate the delicate balance between acknowledging AI’s role in shaping careers without exacerbating fear of displacement among students.
The article suggests focusing on human skills that will remain relevant even as technology advances
articles.insight: This news highlights the need for educational institutions to effectively communicate how AI can complement, rather than replace, human abilities in various industries.

articles.title: TechCrunch Mobility: The AI skills arms race is coming for automotive
articles.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.
articles.summary: TechCrunch is reporting that AI technology in automotin industry isn't just an add-on anymore; it has become a crucial competitive aspect for manufacturers.
points: The race among tech giants and startups to dominate the intelligent driving assistant market intensified this year, with several new features being tested in prototypes.
Amazon's Alexa integration into its vehicles has seen mixed responses from consumers due to privacy concerns over always-on voice recognition systems.
Self-driving vehicle technology companies like Waymo and Tesla are heavily investing in AI research, seeking legal clarity on liability issues for accidents.
articles.insight: The evolving landscape of autonomous driving technologies suggests that the success of these advancements may hinge not only on technical innovation but also consumer trust and regulatory frameworks.

articles.title: For Eclipse, the $2.5B Cerebras win is just the start of realizing its physical-world thesis
articles.description: Investing in the real world was lonely for Lior Susan 10 years ago. Now his firm finds itself at the center of the tech world's action.
articles.summary: Eclipse Systems has won a $2.5 billion contract from Cerebras to develop next-generinh processing chips for AI applications in the real physical world. This win is significant as Eclipse's vision extends beyond traditional cloud and data center environments.
points: Cerebras, an innovative semiconductor company based on Oracle engineers focusing primarily on neural interface hardware with high-bandwidth connections to accelerate AI inferencing speeds in the physical world.

Eclipse's new contract is its largest yet and represents a significant investment by Cerebras. Eclipse has already been developing similar technology for 10 years, but this win promises further advancements due to increased funding.
The success of this project underscores the growing trend towards hardware-based AI solutions that interact directly with physical processes and objects.
articles.insight: This development represents a pivotal shift in how technology industries perceive and invest in the intersection between artificial intelligence, sensory data processing from real world environments, and robotics. It could lead to significant advancements across various sectors that rely on AI.

articles.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
articles.description: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.
articles.summary: In a bid to maintain academic integrity, ArXiv has announced strict measures against authors who rely solely on AI for writing their research articles.
points: ArXiv will impose a one-year ban on authors found using large language models (LLMs) entirely without human contribution in their submissions.
The policy highlights ArXiv's concern about the reliability and originality of AI-generated content, asserting that papers should primarily reflect individual authorship.
This move aligns with broader debates on AI ethics within academia.
articles.insight: The decision indicates a growing awareness in the academic community about maintaining authenticity and integrity of scientific research amidst advancinA recent study reveals that nearly three-quarters (72%) of new hires feel underprepared to write grant proposals. The article discusses strategies for enhancing writing skills specifically tailored towards academia, where fundraising is crucial but often challenging due to the need for persuasive and clear communication in a language that may not be one's mother tongue.

articles.title: The offline desk gadget that actually got me to sit up straight
articles.description: Deep Care's $350 device is pricy, but it runs offline and helps you improve your posture and movement habits
articles.summary: The article discusses a high-priced desk gadget called Deep Care that assists in improving one'neral’s back health by promoting proper posture and movement habits at the workstation. Despite its hefty price tag, it operates without an internet connection.
points: Deep Care is a $350 desk gadget designed to improve users' sitting habits

Workers can use Deep Care as part of their standing or seated work routine at the office and track progress over time with weekly reports that provide details on posture, movement patterns (e.g., sit-to-stand transitions), number of hours spent in either position each day

Deep Care encourages users to engage more frequently throughout their shifts by notifying them when it's appropriate and rewarding good sitting habits with points that can be redeemed for discounted items
articles.insight: The Deep Care desk gadget demonstrates an innovative approach towards promoting better posture and movement among office workers, despite its steep price. As more companies recognize the importance of maintaining good workplace health practices to ensure employee productivity and satisfaction while offering a viable solution that requires no internet connection.

articles.title: Users turn to jailbreaking their older Kindles as Amazon ends support
articles.description: It may be possible to jailbreak an older, end-of-support Kindle and continue adding books to it. But doing so carries risks.
articles.summary: As Amazon ends support for its older e-reader devices like the Kindle Touch model KF5071/2, users have turned to jailbreaking as a way to continue adding books and apps that are unsupported by default on these legacy models. While it's technically feasible, this workaround comes with significant risks.
points: Jailbreaking older Kindle devices like the Touch model KF5071/2 is becoming a popular practice among users to add support for unsupported software as Amazon ends its device and service lifecycle. This allows access to newer apps, themes, or books that are not part of standard updates.

The process involves overriding built-in security measures on Kindle devices which can lead to potential risks like exposure to malware, loss of data integrity, voided warranties and the possibility of hardware damage. These dangers stem from unregulated software installation or missteps during jailbreaking.

Amazon's decision not only affects Kindle users but also highlights a broader trend in technology where manufacturers cease to provide updates for older devices, pushing consumers towards workarounds like jailbreaking.
articles.insight: The news of Amazon ending support reflects the fast-paced and shortened lifecycle modern electronics face, prompting users toward hackery practices such as jailbreaking to extend usability. However, this trend raises concerns about security risks for both consumers and manufacturers.

articles.description: 인증 없이 원격 코드 실행(RCE)과 서버 권한 탈취 가능성 제기F5 “최신 버전 즉시 업데이트 필요” 추가 취약점 3종도 함께 패치[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 전 세계 웹 서버 시장에서 널리 사용되는 엔진엑스 플러스(NGINX Plus) 및 엔진엑스 오픈소스(NGINX Open Source)에서 18년 간 발견되지 않았던 심각한 보안 취약점이 공개됐다.‘엔진
articles.summary: NGINX에서 관심이 많을 때, 18년 전의 예방적인 코드 오프소스와 개정된 엔진엑스 NGINX Plus에서 나타나는 근사한 것이 '인증 없이 원격 코드 실행'와 '서버 권한 탈취'를 가진 적으로 보안에 직접적인 문제점이 있음을 밝힙니다.
points: - '인증 없이 원격 코드 실행'으로 인한 저존에서 직접 정의되어 있는 NGINX Plus에서는 보안성이 제한되어 있지만, Open Source에서는 그러나 '인증 없이 원격 코드 실행' 등의 취약적인 문제점이 있음을 볼 수 0있다.
- '서버 권한 탈취'에 대한 공개된 약속은 종업원이나 강화하거나 심위가 있는 경우로 보면 이상한 문제점을 볼 수 있다.
- '인증 없이 원격 코드 실행'과 '서버 권한 탈취'에 대한 공개된 노하우는 NGINX를 위한 보안 논제가 유 Einzeln의 반면이라고 생각해도, 보안적인 기술이나 공개된 서비스에서는 필수점임을 의사결정하시오.
articles.insight: NGINX를 위한 보안성 중요성이 인crease되고 있어서, 이전에 공개된 NGINX 기능과 관련된 보안 문제점은 IT/기술 업계가 중요하게 참고해야할 사항이다.

articles.title: RJ Scaringe has raised more than $12B across three startups and investors still want more
articles.description: Investors can't seem to get enough of RJ Scaringe or his ideas. Storytelling and communication are one of his superpowers, according to Jiten Behl, who joined Rivian when the company had just a handful of employees.
articles.summary: RJ Scaringe has successfully raised over $12 billion in funding across three ventures.
points: Investors continue to show strong interest in RJ Scaringe and his startups despite significant capital already invested.
The popularity of Rivian, where Behl worked as a senior manager, is linked to the market'intrigue with electric vehicles (EVs).
RJ Scaringe’s communication skills are considered essential in raising investment for his ventures.
articles.insight: The substantial interest and funding RJ Scaringe has secured demonstrate a robust appetite among the technology sector for forward-thinking, high-risk EV startups. This could signal increased confidence within IT/technology industries regarding future investments in green energy solutions.
